actions.value:
We actually can't access the information shared between you and our partnered exchanges in app. Your Edge wallet is a zero-knowledge application with client-side encryption. We care about your privacy! That said, most transactions with these exchanges will fully settle in 1-3 days or less. Any account or order related questions would be best directed to the corresponding support -

 

Do you recognize if it was through any of these companies:

Banxa - https://support.banxa.com

MoonPay - https://support.moonpay.com

Simplex - https://support.simplex.com

Paybis - https://paybis.com/contacts

Bity - https://sophia.bity.com
